# UI Standards

Bonibe Admin should feel like a compact professional back-office system.

## Brand

- Use Bonibe green for navigation, headers, active states, and primary actions.
- Use yellow as a controlled accent for warnings or review states.
- Keep backgrounds light and readable.
- Avoid full-screen neon green surfaces.
- Use the Bonibe logo in the app shell and reports.

## Layout

- Default to dense, scannable admin pages.
- Use tables, filters, tabs, segmented controls, and compact panels for work surfaces.
- Cards should use 8px radius or less.
- Avoid marketing hero layouts for the admin app.
- Make mobile usable, but optimize for desktop/tablet admin use.
- Do not put cards inside cards.

## Controls

- Use icons in icon buttons and tool actions.
- Use `lucide-react` icons when available.
- Use menus for option sets, toggles for binary state, and inputs/steppers for numeric values.
- Keep touch targets around 44px minimum.
- Avoid fixed heights where admin text, errors, or table cells can wrap.

## Reports

- Use print-safe colors.
- Include Bonibe header details, branch/client, date range, totals, and signature labels where applicable.
